name: Block Occupancy Summary
query:
SELECT
    name as "Block:Link/Block Master:150",
    camp as "Camp:Link/Camp Master:150",
    total_rooms as "Total Rooms:Int:100",
    total_beds as "Total Beds:Int:100",
    occupied_beds as "Occupied Beds:Int:110",
    (total_beds - occupied_beds) as "Vacant Beds:Int:110",
    ROUND(occupied_beds / NULLIF(total_beds, 0) * 100, 1) as "Occupancy Percent:Percent:110"
FROM `tabBlock Master`
WHERE status = 'Active'
    AND (%(camp)s = '' OR camp = %(camp)s)
ORDER BY camp, name
